headline: 15 contracts catalogued across Ethereum, BSC, and Solana; 5 key infrastructure contracts (USYC token, Teller, Cross Chain Teller, Oracle, Entitlements) plus testnet variants

findings.text: Ethereum Etherscan search found USYC token contract (0x136471a34f6ef19fe571effc1ca711fdb8e49f2b) via token tracker pages; searched via search.circle.com queries due to direct explorer access restrictions

Official deployments documented at https://developers.circle.com/tokenized/usyc/smart-contracts (Circle Docs) and https://usyc.docs.hashnote.com/overview/smart-contracts (Hashnote Docs); both list identical mainnet and testnet addresses across Ethereum, BSC, and Solana
No audit PDFs found; protocol.audit_links is empty; docs reference 'audited smart contract' but no external audit report URLs discovered
Protocol.github is null; no GitHub repository discovered via search; Circle and Hashnote do not appear to publish USYC source code repositories

Ethereum mainnet: 5 contracts (USYC token, Teller, Cross Chain Teller, Oracle, Entitlements); BSC mainnet: 3 contracts (USYC token, Cross Chain Teller, Entitlements); Solana mainnet: 2 contracts (USYC token, Teller). Near and Noble: listed in protocol.chains but NO USYC-specific contracts found in official documentation—only USDC is deployed there
No factory pattern contracts identified; USYC is a single-token deployment with peripheral infrastructure contracts
Role taxonomy applied: token (USYC), teller (subscription/redemption), oracle (price feed), other (Entitlements access control)
All addresses trace to fetched Circle Docs and Hashnote Docs deployment tables; no snippet-only sightings

rationale.verdict: Discovery phase catalogues 15 mainnet contract addresses (5 unique roles) across Ethereum, BSC, and Solana per official documentation. NEAR and Noble chains listed in protocol metadata but no USYC contracts deployed there (only USDC). No GitHub source code or audit reports discovered. Admin control structure (Entitlements contract, oracle) and token administrator (Circle International Bermuda Limited) identified from docs but specific multisig/governance addresses not yet resolved.

evidence.shows: Official Circle Docs deployment table: Ethereum mainnet (USYC token 0x136471a34f6ef19fE571EFFC1CA711fdb8E49f2b, Teller 0xeE35F963BFC71b51eC95147f26c030D674ea30e6, Cross Chain Teller 0x5dbeCcECEbCdC2ce3258f6E638373d2923560c7d, Oracle 0x74f2199AEb743f68f05943e5715A33EaF2b61f53, Entitlements 0x902D906b8d988092213bE799B18Bd2cbd64F808C); BSC mainnet (USYC token 0x8D0fA28f221eB5735BC71d3a0Da67EE5bC821311, Cross Chain Teller 0xf38979E05650be7926EA07BB59C48Fb9b1DB3D08, Entitlements 0x6B7d54003f73bE979cf92BF369432aC534853692); Solana mainnet (USYC SPL22 7LWanZteUKtvFjv4MHYgKXXdAuCQYFPJysL9pxxdRQGn, Teller EMfvuBR8rre2f7sNqdDyPzQW7kgBUsVtxg7nX93YwAdm)

Hashnote Docs deployment table with identical mainnet addresses; confirms Ethereum (USYC 0x136471a34f6ef19fE571EFFC1CA711fdb8E49f2b, Teller 0xeE35F963BFC71b51eC95147f26c030D674ea30e6, Cross Chain Teller 0x5dbeCcECEbCdC2ce3258f6E638373d2923560c7d, Oracle 0x74f2199AEb743f68f05943e5715A33EaF2b61f53, Entitlements 0x902D906b8d988092213bE799B18Bd2cbd64F808C), BSC, Solana

Official protocol overview: USYC is onchain representation of Hashnote International Short Duration Yield Fund Ltd., issued by Circle International Bermuda Limited, regulated by BMA; states 'The token contract is audited and verified on Etherscan' but does not link to external audit report

Product structure: Entitlements contract performs KYC/AML gating and OFAC sanctions checks via Chainalysis oracle; Hashnote has ability to freeze all USYC transactions via Entitlements contract; Smart Contract Teller handles subscription/redemption

Homepage confirms USYC on Ethereum (ERC-20 verified on Etherscan) and Solana (SPL-22); states Circle International Bermuda Limited as token administrator; notes USYC is available on BNB Chain; no mention of NEAR or Noble USYC deployments
USYC launched on BNB Chain; confirms ERC-20/BEP-20 standard compatibility; reiterates Circle International Bermuda Limited as token administrator; no mention of NEAR or Noble USYC deployments

unknowns: D3: No audit PDF or report discovered; docs reference audited contract but no external audit link provided
D4: No GitHub repository recorded or discovered
D5-offchain: NEAR and Noble listed in protocol.chains but no USYC contract addresses documented; only USDC deployed on those chains per search results

D8: No multisig/governance/admin address(es) discovered; only Entitlements contract and Chainalysis oracle operator surfaced; token administrator is Circle International Bermuda Limited (off-chain entity)

admin_addresses.role: Entitlements (access control, KYC gate, OFAC checks, emergency pause)
Entitlements (access control, KYC gate, OFAC checks, emergency pause)

protocol_metadata.about: USYC is a tokenized money market fund representing shares in Hashnote International Short Duration Yield Fund Ltd., invested in short-term US Treasury bills and reverse repurchase agreements. Issued by Circle International Bermuda Limited and regulated by the Bermuda Monetary Authority (BMA), it offers non-US persons institutional-grade yield exposure with near-instant USDC redemption, permissioned access via Entitlements smart contracts, and transparent onchain oracle pricing.
